Table of Contents

Interface IVertexAttribute2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

additional operations for geometries that can have attributes (z, m, id) on their vertices.

[Guid("2356DB4E-721C-45D1-8A22-9DD1865BFA8F")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IVertexAttribute2 : IVertexAttribute

Methods

CalculateNonSimpleVertexAttributes(esriGeometryAttributes) 

void CalculateNonSimpleVertexAttributes(esriGeometryAttributes attributeType)

Parameters

attributeType esriGeometryAttributes

CalculateNonSimpleVertexAttributes2(esriGeometryAttributes, bool, bool)

Extrapolates/interpolates the non-simple vertex attribute values. If useSegmentExtrapolation is true, then the segment immediately incident on those to be extrapolated will be used to determine the extrapolation ratio.

void CalculateNonSimpleVertexAttributes2(esriGeometryAttributes attributeType, bool useSegmentExtrapolation, bool applySingleAtt)

Parameters

attributeType esriGeometryAttributes
useSegmentExtrapolation bool
applySingleAtt bool

attributeType esriGeometryAttributes
extrapolationStyle esriExtrapolationEnum
startPart int
startPoint int
endPart int
endPoint int

startPart int
startPoint int

ReplaceVertexAttributes(esriGeometryAttributes, double, double)

Replace vertex attributes having the specified value with the new value.

oldAtt double
newAtt double
